text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I suppose you could say that. I made a bit of a
mistake...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I went to wash Tamtam's tracksuit, you see, but I
accidentally poured bleach in.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I never make mistakes like that. Honestly, I can't
believe myself.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tamtam brushed it off in her usual way with a
smile and a joke...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But I'm still trying to figure out how I could even mess up like that. Sigh...
